data.title: List of 13 top press releases in September 2026 covering best colleges, IPOs, M&A, Red Lobster menu addition, and football news.
data.description: The top colleges of 2026 have been revealed alongside multiple significant IPO and M&A declarations, including Red Lobster unveiling an exciting addition to their menu. Stay informed amidst the influx of information to ensure you are up-to-date on the latest developments.

data.title: Agricultural biologicals market to reach $34.99 billion by 2030 from $18.44 billion in 2025, with CAGR of 13.7%.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ revealed that the agricultural biologicals market is currently valued at USD 18.44 billion in 2025. It is anticipated to grow significantly, projected to reach USD 34.99 billion by 2030, indicating a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.7% during the forecast period. This data underscores a promising trend in the industry. Ongoing research efforts are also being conducted to further explore...

data.title: Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients market to reach US$ 428.5 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 6.8%. Size was US$ 238.7 billion in 2024 and US$ 224.7 billion in 2023.
data.description: In October 3, 2025, it was reported that the Active Pharmaceutical Ingredients Market Size had achieved US$ 238.7 Billion in 2024, a notable increase from US$ 224.7 Billion in the previous year. Projections suggest that this market is poised for further growth, set to reach US$ 428.5 Billion by 2033, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.8%.

data.title: Strada appoints Matt Bolson as Chief Revenue Officer to drive global growth and innovation in Texas.
data.description: In The Woodlands, Texas, Strada has recently appointed Matt Bolson as their new Chief Revenue Officer.

data.title: Duodenoscopes market to reach USD 2.2 billion by 2030 - 5.53% CAGR projected by Mordor Intelligence.
data.description: A report by Mordor Intelligence reveals that the duodenoscopes market in Hyderabad, India is worth USD 1.61 billion in 2025 and is estimated to exceed USD 2.2 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.53% between 2025 and 2030. This growth is attributed to increasing trends in the market.

data.title: Cango Inc. updates Bitcoin production & mining operations for September 2025. Key metrics revealed, including comparison to August 2025.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 3, 2025, Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) released its latest update on Bitcoin production and mining activities for September 2025. The report detailed key metrics for the month, comparing them to those of August 2025. The company's Bitcoin mining production and operations in September showcased significant progress, with specific numbers indicating a noteworthy increase in output or efficiency.

data.title: Robo.ai and Changer.ae launch Roboy339, first smart vehicle with digital wallet, revealed at TOKEN2049. #innovation
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on October 3, 2025, Robo.ai Inc. (Nasdaq: AIIO) and a Digital Asset Custodian regulated by the UAE, Changer.ae, introduced "Roboy339" at TOKEN2049. This groundbreaking smart vehicle is the first of its kind to feature a personal digital wallet. The collaboration between Robo.ai and Changer.ae commenced in August 2025.

data.title: Scania introduces high-floor battery-electric platform at Busworld for first zero-emission coaches. Major step towards electrification.
data.description: In SÖDERTÄLJE, Sweden, on October 3, 2025, Scania made a significant move towards electrifying new market areas by revealing its latest high-floor battery-electric bus and coach platform at Busworld Europe. This unveiling marks a major milestone for Scania in diversifying its offerings with electric vehicles. The development of the new BEV platform is a crucial step in Scania's commitment to sustainability and reducing carbon emissions. This move highlights Scania's dedication to innovation and staying at the forefront of the evolving automotive industry.

data.title: Q3 saw a 37% decrease in crypto hack losses to $509 million. Million-dollar incidents spiked in September, mostly from exchange and DeFi hacks.
data.description: In the third quarter, losses due to crypto hacks decreased by 37% to $509 million. However, September witnessed a significant spike in million-dollar incidents, primarily driven by hacks targeting exchanges and DeFi platforms.
